summary:
**Positive sentiment overall (score ~ +65), with optimism centered on TXN's improving fundamentals heading into 2026.**[[1]](https://www.tipranks.com/news/why-2026-could-be-a-harvest-year-for-texas-instruments-stock-txn)[[2]](https://www.tikr.com/blog/heres-why-texas-instruments-stock-could-hit-324-in-2026)

**Key elements from recent sources (as of mid-April 2026):**

- **News & Analysis**: Multiple articles highlight 2026 as a potential "harvest year" after a multi-year capital-intensive build
